Bug Title: Unnecessary Language Option (BN) Displayed in Language Selector in org panel
Description: The language selector currently displays three options: English (EN), Arabic (AR), and Bengali (BN). However, only English and Arabic should be available.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the organization panel
2. Click on the language selector dropdown
3. observe the available language options
Expected Result: Only “English (EN)” and “Arabic (AR)” should be displayed in the language selector.
Actual Result: “Bengali (BN)” option is also displayed along with English and Arabic.

Description: In the organization panel, the total transaction amount is not being calculated accurately. The displayed total transactions is 0, which may lead to incorrect financial reporting.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the organization Panel dashboard 
2. Navigate to the Transactions section
3. Check the current panel amount
Expected Result: The total transaction amount should accurately reflect the parcased current plan.
Actual Result: Displayed the total transaction amount is 0

Bug Title: Course Management – Hide Specific Fields on Course Overview Page
Description:
On the Course Overview page in Course Management, several elements are currently visible that should be hidden. These include:
Regular Price, Offer Price, Total Transactions, Course Edit Button, Create Chapter Button, Course Price
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to Org panel
2. In course management, click course
3. click course for course overview
4. Observe the course overview page
Expected Result:
The following fields and buttons should be hidden on the Course Overview page:
Regular Price, Offer Price Total Transactions, Course Edit Button, Create Chapter Button, Course Price
Actual Result: All the above fields and buttons are currently visible.

Description: In the Organization Panel, the Settings option is currently visible, but it should be hidden for organization users based on role requirements.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the Organization Panel.
2. Observe the sidebar or menu options.
3. Locate the Settings option.
Expected Result: The Settings option should not be visible in the Organization Panel.
Actual Result: The Settings option is visible to organization users.

Bug Title: Dashboard from Profile Icon Not Updated
Description: In the Organization Panel, when clicking the profile icon and then selecting Dashboard, the page shown is not updated and does not match the current/latest dashboard design or data.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the Organization Panel.
2. Click on the profile icon.
3. Click on Dashboard.
4. Observe the displayed dashboard.
Expected Result: The dashboard accessed from the profile icon should display the latest/updated dashboard UI and data, consistent with the main dashboard
Actual Result: An outdated or inconsistent dashboard is displayed.

Bug Title: Logout Popup – Incorrect Button Text “Yes Delete It”
Description: In the logout confirmation popup, the confirmation button is incorrectly labeled as “Yes Delete It”, which is misleading and not appropriate for a logout action.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Click on the Logout button.
2. Observe the confirmation popup.
Expected Result:
The confirmation button should display appropriate text such as:

“Yes, Logout” or “Confirm Logout”
Actual Result: The button text is shown as “Yes Delete It”.

Description: After registering and logging in with a new organization account, the notification section displays older notifications that do not belong to the new organization.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Register a new organization account
2. Log in with the new organization credentials
3. Go to the notification section
Expected Result: The notification section should only show notifications relevant to the newly registered organization (or be empty if none exist).
Actual Result: Older notifications are displayed, which are not related to the new organization.

Bug Title: No Verification in Organization Registration Process
Description: There is no verification process during organization registration. Users can sign up without any email verification, OTP, or SMTP validation, which creates a security risk.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to organization registration
2. Sign up with any email
3. Complete registration
Expected Result: User should go through a verification process (e.g., email verification, OTP, or SMTP validation)
Actual Result: Registration is completed without any verification process
